name: GitHub Copilot
arrSource: MSFT earnings narrative — 4.7M paid subs, GitHub total $2B ARR; Copilot midpoint $1-2.3B → $1.65B

narrative.claimed: 4.7M paid subs (verified, MSFT earnings). GitHub total $2B ARR — Copilot est. $1-2.3B
narrative.usage: 42% market share of AI coding. 27-30% acceptance rate (not 55% — that was task speed). Lost $20/user/mo in 2023 (WSJ).
narrative.real: $1-2.3B — the ONE product where AI IS the product
narrative.flags: Genuinely works. But facing Cursor ($1B ARR), open-source alternatives. Microsoft added Anthropic models "at great expense to margins" (SemiAnalysis). Usage caps introduced mid-2025.
